nasb.text: Balaam replied to the servants of Balak, “Though Balak were to give me his house full of silver and gold, I could not do anything, either small or great, contrary to the command of the Lord my God.

esv.text: But Balaam answered and said to the servants of Balak, “Though Balak were to give me his house full of silver and gold, I could not go beyond the command of the Lord my God to do less or more.

cnv.text: 巴蘭回答巴勒的臣僕說：“巴勒就算把他滿屋的金銀給我，但我不論作大事小事，也不能越過耶和華我　神的命令。

ccb.text: 巴兰回答说：“巴勒就是把他满屋的金银都给我，我也不能在任何事上违背我的上帝耶和华的命令。
